feature: Production Readiness - Top 3 High-Priority Missing Practices
scope: Lightweight, one-man shop friendly. .env.example placeholders only. Batched edits <=3 per operation. No new secrets. No mass changes.
implemented: 1. Sentry Error Monitoring + client-side tracking (web + mobile) + Supabase Unified Logs (best-effort insert)
- Sentry wired in apps/web/app/layout.tsx + global handlers
2. Proper Auth Gating using Next.js Middleware (redirect unauthenticated)
- AuthContext.tsx updates: sets/clears 'laslogtmx-auth' cookie for middleware visibility
- Public prefixes: auth, pricing, cble; protected: load-board, chat, admin, settings, receipts, expenses, motus
3. App-level Rate Limiting on Load Board (posting, bidding)
- Enforced + error captured in useLoadBoard.postLoad and useBidding.submitBid (per-company keys)
Admin dashboard quick links to Sentry / Supabase / Upstash
README.md: new Production Readiness section + setup instructions
Mobile + web error tracking + rate checks
key_decisions: Chose Upstash over Edge Functions for rate limit (no new supabase deploy, instant REST, free tier, fits lightweight)
Middleware uses cookie marker (no @supabase/ssr refactor for limited scope)
Sentry client-only + shared util for web/mobile parity (full server config can be added later)
Rate checks in client hooks (layered; real enforcement still RLS + CF). Fail-open fallback.
unified_logs is best-effort (non breaking if table absent)
No new migrations to keep scope small (user can run CREATE TABLE)
Followed safetySKILL.md: backup first, env placeholders, summaries, batch <=3, no hardcodes
next_steps: npm install (root + to pull new sentry/upstash)
Set real NEXT_PUBLIC_SENTRY_DSN and UPSTASH_* in .env.local
(Optional) CREATE TABLE public.unified_logs ... in Supabase for logs aggregation
Test middleware: visit /load-board logged-out → should redirect /auth/login
Add real Sentry release/env in build for prod
Consider moving post/bid to server API routes for stricter rate enforcement later
safety: All changes on feature branch. Backup branch preserved. Only .env.example used.
